narrative:
73 Ohio House district has 86,731 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.0%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.7% D−R vs -17.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
